falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 12% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this threshold would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by proving a bullish trend is underway, contradicting the pattern's historical bottom context.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-day moving average of Bitcoin's trading volume exceeds 200% of its 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate explosive buying pressure, directly refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear market conviction contrary to the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This named event would create a material shift in macro conditions, invalidating the current pattern match by introducing a new catalyst unaccounted for in the original analysis.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
